## Concern

What looks inaccurate, incomplete, or potentially misleading?

## Location

- Output file:
- Topic:
- Section:
- Page/snippet shown in guide:

## Source evidence

Please link the public qualification page or describe the relevant specification
section. Do not upload copyrighted PDFs, past papers, or mark schemes.

## Suggested correction

What should the guide say instead?

## Severity

- [ ] Blocks student use
- [ ] Needs teacher review
- [ ] Minor wording issue
